name: Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, missed vendor rebates cause cash flow gaps. We automate rebate tracking instead of manual tracking of vendor rebates.
problem_solved: Missed vendor rebates due to manual tracking processes.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Missed vendor rebates due to manual tracking processes.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, missed vendor rebates cause cash flow gaps. We automate rebate tracking instead of manual tracking of vendor rebates.

one_liner: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, missed vendor rebates cause cash flow gaps. We automate rebate tracking instead of manual tracking of vendor rebates.
